summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework featuring a custom runner, schema validation, and MCP integration, heavily utilizing AI agent-generated test suites.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
uncommitted or partially staged changes in working directory
potential duplication between root test files and agent-generated test files (e.g., mcp_extra_test.go)
suggestions: clean up or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository noise
commit or stash the currently staged and modified files
consolidate duplicate extra test files generated by different agents
